title: PostgreSQL Crash Course - Beginner Tutorial
summary: A beginner-level tutorial covering PostgreSQL fundamentals including table creation, data manipulation with SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE, filtering with WHERE clauses, aggregation with GROUP BY, joins across multiple tables, foreign keys, and relationship modeling.
